Episodes.Title: Four Hundred Dawns
Episodes.Writer: William Emms, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: After an encounter with a hostile robot called a Chumblie, the Doctor and his companions are rescued by a group of female Drahvins.

Episodes.Title: Trap of Steel
Episodes.Writer: William Emms, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Maureen O'Brien
Episodes.Plot: With the knowledge that the planet will be destroyed in two days, the Drahvins instruct the Doctor to help them steal the Rills' ship.

Episodes.Title: Air Lock
Episodes.Writer: William Emms, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Maureen O'Brien
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Vicki encounter the Rills and learn the situation is more complex than they thought while Steven finds the Drahvins' hospitality ever more perilous.

Episodes.Title: The Exploding Planet
Episodes.Writer: William Emms, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Vicki enlist the aid of the Chumblies to rescue Steven from the Drahvins and then find a way off the planet before its destruction.

Episodes.Title: Mission to the Unknown
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Barry Jackson, Edward de Souza
Episodes.Plot: Whilst The Doctor, Steven and Vicki are traveling to their next destination, on the planet Kembel, Marc Cory, a Space Security Service agent discovers The Daleks are attending a secret meeting with their allies. Where Cory discove...

Episodes.Title: Temple of Secrets
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Maureen O'Brien
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands in the middle of the Trojan War, where the Doctor is mistaken for the god Zeus.

Episodes.Title: Small Prophet, Quick Return
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: While Odysseus forces the Doctor to find a way to win the war, Steven decides to get himself taken prisoner in order to enter Troy and find Vicki and the TARDIS.

Episodes.Title: Death of a Spy
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: With Steven and Vicki being held prisoner by the Trojans, the Doctor's only hope of seeing them again is to suggest the idea of the Trojan Horse.

Episodes.Title: Horse of Destruction
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Maureen O'Brien, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor waits inside the Trojan Horse for a chance to reach his companions but Steven's assumed identity as a Greek soldier and Vicki's growing feelings for Troilus endanger their escape.

Episodes.Title: The Nightmare Begins
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Adrienne Hill, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor runs afoul of the Daleks and Special Security Agent Bret Vyon on the planet Kembel.

Episodes.Title: Day of Armageddon
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Kevin Stoney, Julian Sherrier
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor infiltrates the Daleks' conference to try and discover their plans, leaving Steven, Katarina and Bret to find a way off the planet.

Episodes.Title: Devil's Planet
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Nicholas Courtney, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and his friends escape Kembel in the Spar ship but the Daleks force them down on the planet Desperus, where they are threatened by a group of convicts.

Episodes.Title: The Traitors
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Nicholas Courtney, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: With Katarina being held hostage, the Doctor, Steven and Bret are in danger of having to given in to Kirksen's demands, while, on Earth, Chen has them listed as traitors.

Episodes.Title: Counter Plot
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Sara are accidentally transported to the planet Mira where Chen sends the Daleks after them.

Episodes.Title: Coronas of the Sun
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Sara escape Mira in a Dalek pursuit ship but when they find the ship is returning to Kembel, they are forced to come up with a new plan to avoid the Daleks.

Episodes.Title: The Feast of Steven
Episodes.Writer: Terry Nation, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Sara visit a Liverpool police station on Christmas Day and a Hollywood film set during the 1920s.

Episodes.Title: Volcano
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: The Daleks realise the Doctor has given them a fake Taranium Core while, on the planet Tigus, the Doctor encounters the Meddling Monk.

Episodes.Title: Golden Death
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Sara travel to Ancient Egypt, pursued by both the Daleks and the Meddling Monk.

Episodes.Title: Escape Switch
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: Steven, Sara and the Monk are captured by the Daleks in order to force the Doctor to hand over the Taranium Core.

Episodes.Title: The Abandoned Planet
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Terry Nation (from an idea by)
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh, Kevin Stoney
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Sara reach Kembel where they find the Daleks have betrayed their allies and imprisoned them.

Episodes.Title: Destruction of Time
Episodes.Writer: Dennis Spooner, Terry Nation, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jean Marsh
Episodes.Plot: With the Daleks poised to invade the solar system, the Doctor decides his only option is to activate the Time Destructor prematurely, threatening the entire planet.

Episodes.Title: War of God
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald Tosh
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, David Weston
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS lands in sixteenth century Paris and Steven becomes involved with a group of Huguenots.

Episodes.Title: The Sea Beggar
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Leonard Sachs
Episodes.Plot: While trying to find the Doctor, Steven discovers a conspiracy to assassinate a man known as the Sea Beggar.

Episodes.Title: Priest of Death
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, André Morell
Episodes.Plot: Steven has discovered the identity of the Sea Beggar, but can he warn the Huguenots in time?

Episodes.Title: Bell of Doom
Episodes.Writer: John Lucarotti, Donald Tosh, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, André Morell
Episodes.Plot: Steven rejoins the Doctor and they leave Paris just ahead of the massacre, leaving Anne behind.

Episodes.Title: The Steel Sky
Episodes.Writer: Paul Erickson, Lesley Scott, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Dodo arrive on a giant spaceship millions of years in the future, transporting the last humans away from the doomed Earth.

Episodes.Title: The Plague
Episodes.Writer: Paul Erickson, Lesley Scott
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Inigo Jackson, Peter Purves, Jackie Lane
Episodes.Plot: With the Ark infected with a cold virus, the Doctor must convince the Guardians to trust him so he can find a cure.

Episodes.Title: The Return
Episodes.Writer: Paul Erickson, Lesley Scott, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jackie Lane
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Dodo have traveled 700 years into the future and find that the Ark is now under the control of the Monoids as it approaches Refusis.

Episodes.Title: The Bomb
Episodes.Writer: Paul Erickson, Lesley Scott, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Edmund Coulter
Episodes.Plot: The Monoids abandon the Ark, leaving Steven and the Guardians to die, but a mutiny in their ranks may give the Doctor a chance to bring about peace.

Episodes.Title: The Celestial Toyroom
Episodes.Writer: Brian Hayles, Gerry Davis, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jackie Lane
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Dodo arrive in the realms of the Celestial Toymaker, who forces them to play his deadly games.

Episodes.Title: The Hall of Dolls
Episodes.Writer: Brian Hayles, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jackie Lane
Episodes.Plot: While the Doctor continues to play the Trilogic Game with the Toymaker, Steven and Dodo are involved in a deadly game of musical chairs.

Episodes.Title: The Dancing Floor
Episodes.Writer: Brian Hayles, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jackie Lane
Episodes.Plot: Steven and Dodo are forced to cross the dancing floor, where the Toymaker's dolls plan to force them to dance for eternity.

Episodes.Title: The Final Test
Episodes.Writer: Brian Hayles, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Peter Purves, Jackie Lane
Episodes.Plot: As the Doctor nears the end of his game against the Toymaker, Steven and Dodo take on Cyril in a lethal game of hopscotch to try and recover the TARDIS.

Episodes.Title: A Holiday for the Doctor
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Hurndell, Maurice Good
Episodes.Plot: The TARDIS arrives in Tombstone, Arizona in 1881. Where the Doctor is looking for a dentist when he has a toothache, where The Doctor finds the local dentist is the famous Doc Holliday who is in a feud with The Clanton Brothers an...

Episodes.Title: Don't Shoot the Pianist
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Hurndell, Maurice Good
Episodes.Plot: With the Clantons believing the Doctor to be Doc Holliday, Wyatt Earp takes him into protective custody but this leaves Steven and Dodo in danger.

Episodes.Title: Johnny Ringo
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, William Hurndell, David Cole
Episodes.Plot: Earp comes to Steven's rescue and arrests Phineas Clanton, prompting the Clantons to decide to enlist the help of Johnny Ringo.

Episodes.Title: The O.K. Corral
Episodes.Writer: Donald Cotton, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Martyn Huntley, William Hurndell
Episodes.Plot: The Clantons have shot Warren Earp, leading to a showdown between the two families with the Doctor powerless to prevent bloodshed.

Episodes.Title: The Savages: Episode 1
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Dodo arrive in the far future and are welcomed by the advanced civilisation of the Elders but soon begin to suspect they are hiding a secret.

Episodes.Title: The Savages: Episode 2
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor, Steven and Dodo investigate why there are Savages in the Elders' city and uncover the true price of the Elders' perfect society.

Episodes.Title: The Savages: Episode 3
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Sydney Newman, Donald Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor has been subjected to the Elders' extraction process and Steven and Dodo must return to their city to rescue him.

Episodes.Title: The Savages: Episode 4
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Sydney Newman, Donald B. Wilson
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, Peter Purves
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor urges the Savages to finally bring an end to the Elders' oppression and enlists the help of an unlikely ally.

Episodes.Title: The War Machines: Episode 1
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Kit Pedler, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, Alan Curtis
Episodes.Plot: The Doctor and Dodo return to London in the present day where the Doctor becomes concerned about WOTAN, a new super-computer installed in the Post Officer Tower.

Episodes.Title: The War Machines: Episode 2
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Kit Pedler, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Jackie Lane, John Harvey
Episodes.Plot: Dodo is under the control of WOTAN and attempts to lure the Doctor into a trap, while the rest of WOTAN's slaves begin construction on its robotic War Machines.

Episodes.Title: The War Machines: Episode 3
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Kit Pedler, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Alan Curtis, Michael Craze
Episodes.Plot: Ben tries to escape from the warehouse but is captured by Polly, who is now also under WOTAN's control, and forced to work on construction the War Machine.

Episodes.Title: The War Machines: Episode 4
Episodes.Writer: Ian Stuart Black, Kit Pedler, Sydney Newman
Episodes.Actors: William Hartnell, Gerald Taylor, John Boyd-Brent
Episodes.Plot: The first War Machine is defeated but the Doctor only has a matter of hours to destroy WOTAN before the rest of its army is activated.
